overrides.expect: h _ {i} ^ {+} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \frac {1}{2} + \frac {1}{2} \big (1 - (q / p) ^ {i} \big) & \text {for i = 0,1,2,\ldots ,} \\ \frac {1}{2} - \frac {1}{2} \big (1 - (q / p) ^ {- i} \big) & \text {for i = -1,-2,\ldots .} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: h _ {i} ^ {+} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \frac {1}{2} + \frac {1}{2} \big (1 - (q / p) ^ {i} \big) & \text {for } i = 0,1,2,\ldots , \\ \frac {1}{2} - \frac {1}{2} \big (1 - (q / p) ^ {- i} \big) & \text {for } i = -1,-2,\ldots . \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} k _ {i} ^ {j} = \delta_ {i j} + (p _ {i, i - 1} k _ {i - 1} ^ {j} + p _ {i i} k _ {i} ^ {j} + p _ {i, i + 1} k _ {i + 1} ^ {j}) \quad \text {for i = 1,\ldots,m - 1} \\ k _ {0} ^ {j} = k _ {m} ^ {j} = 0. \end{array}

overrides.expect: k _ {i} ^ {j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} (i / j) k _ {j} ^ {j} & \text {for i\leq j} \\ \big ((m - i) / (m - j) \big) k _ {j} ^ {j} & \text {for i\geq j} \end{array} \right.
